channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: No. 1 Oregon outlasts No. 3 Penn State 45-37 for Big Ten title and 1st-round bye in playoffs
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Dillon Gabriel threw four touchdown passes and No. 1 Oregon outlasted No. 3 Penn State 45-37 on Saturday night in the Big Ten championship, giving the Ducks a first-round bye and almost certainly the top seed in the College Football Playoff. The Ducks (13-0, No.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL MAROT, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Jokic's career high of 56 points comes during a low point for the Nuggets
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Nikola Jokic scored a career-high 56 points and had little to celebrate afterward. It happened in a loss — to a team that hadn't won since October. “I think today and the last couple games were really bad for us,” Jokic said. “We are really going in the wrong direction.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Archie Manning reveals preferred NFL landing spot for grandson, Texas star Arch Manning
item.description: Arch Manning was one of the most highly touted recruits in recent history. He can't enter next year's NFL Draft, but all eyes will be on him when he does make the leap to the pros.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bamdad, Palmer score 2 TDs each, but SHP falls to Summerville in NorCal 6-A title game
item.description: Sacred Heart Prep didn't have a satisfactory answer for Summerville quarterback Bryce Leveroos, who scored six touchdowns to lead his team to victory in Atherton.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Baltimore Orioles reach $49.5M, 3-year deal with OF Tyler O'Neill, AP source says
item.description: A person familiar with the negoatiations says the Baltimore Orioles have agreed to a $49.5 million, three-year contract with outfielder Tyler O’Neill.
item.dc:creator: Noah Trister, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck leaves SEC championship with injury
item.description: Georgia quarterback Carson Beck left Saturday's SEC championship game against Texas after taking a hard hit on the final play of the first half.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Big 12's Yormark brings up hard choices for fans before sparsely attended title game
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — A little more than an hour before the Big 12 championship game kicked off in front of thousands of empty seats at the home of the Dallas Cowboys, Commissioner Brett Yormark brought up the conundrum faced by fans with the expanded postseason format.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NFL closes probe of latest Deshaun Watson sexual assault allegations without discipline
item.description: An NFL spokesperson said the investigation into the most recent sexual assault allegations against Browns QB Deshaun Watson is now considered closed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lindsey Vonn competes in a pair of downhills, another step on her comeback trail at the age of 40
item.description: COPPER MOUNTAIN, Colo. (AP) — For a pair of lower-level downhill events, this sure had plenty of Olympic medal-capturing and World Cup-winning ski racers.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chicago hosts conference rival Philadelphia
item.description: Philadelphia 76ers (6-15, 13th in the Eastern Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (10-14, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 1 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Nikola Vucevic and the Chicago Bulls take on Tyrese Maxey and the Philadelphia 76ers on Sunday. The Bulls are 8-7 in Eastern Conference games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: High school facing student uprising over ban of shirts protesting trans athletes after girls beg for safety
item.description: Students at Martin Luther King High School in Riverside, California, are said to be planning weekly defiance against the school for rules preventing anti-trans shirts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: BYU inks 18 players on National Signing Day
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU football head coach Kalani Sitake announced 18 high school signees to the 2025 recruiting class on Wednesday’s first day of the December early signing period.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Big Ten fines Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for postgame melee
item.description: The Big Ten Conference announced it fined Michigan and Ohio State $100,000 each for violating the conference's sportsmanship policy for the on-field melee at the end of the Wolverines' win in Columbus on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5
